name: Lost Dreams
short_description: Surviving the plane crash was only the beginning. Now you must find a way to escape the island and survive the strange creatures that inhabit it. Manage your ammunition, endure, and explore in this terrifying experience.
detailed_description:
After surviving a plane crash, Frank wakes up disoriented on a strange and dangerous island. Surviving the crash was only the beginning—now he must endure the dangerous creatures that roam across the island and will give our protagonist more than one headache.




ENEMIES


These dangerous creatures deal heavy damage when they bite and attack you. You will have different types of weapons to fight them, from a pistol to a knife. You will also have a shotgun, a crossbow, and a rifle, but you must manage your ammunition and inventory space wisely.



KEEP YOUR DISTANCE


When you get too close, they will lunge at you and manage to bite you, but if you are quick, you can push them off and throw them away from you. Keeping them at a distance will be crucial for survival. Be very careful, as tall grass will sometimes make it difficult to spot them.



EXPLORATION


Search every corner of the environments and find wooden barrels that you can break to obtain items inside. Exploration and resource gathering are crucial for survival in this experience. Inside you can find healing materials, ammunition for different weapons, money, and more.


Use your lighter to illuminate dark areas—it will be useful in places filled with darkness.



COLLECTIBLES


Search and find the collectible golden statuettes hidden throughout the game! There are 49 collectible figures waiting to be discovered!



SOLVE PUZZLES


At times, you will need to solve different puzzles to obtain important items that will help you progress through the story, as well as special keys.



SAVE YOUR PROGRESS


You will find old computers scattered across the island, where you can save your progress—provided you have a diskette. Don’t worry, there are diskettes spread throughout the areas, you just need to find them.



You can also obtain money, which can be used in the island’s vending machines as shops to purchase ammunition, weapons, and healing items. Money can be found in different game areas or in breakable barrels.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Turkish
